seoTitle: Willowie vs Willson River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Willowie and Willson River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Willowie vs Willson River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willowie and Willson River.
heading: Willowie vs Willson River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willowie, South Australia and Willson River, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willowie has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Willson River (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willowie or Willson River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willowie has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Willson River scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willowie scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Willson River scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willowie or Willson River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willowie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
